disciplines.name: Serpentis
disciplines.notes: Signature Discipline of the Followers of Set, focusing on serpentine transformations, hypnotic gazes, and corruptive or transfigurative powers.

powers.name: Eyes of the Serpent
powers.system_text: Allows a Setite to paralyze or entrance victims through direct eye contact, making them easier to manipulate or feed upon.
powers.vbn_notes: Core power for social predators; ideal for Elysium scenes and one-on-one temptations.

powers.name: Skin of the Adder
powers.system_text: Transforms the Setite's body into a more serpentine form, providing protection and a more threatening presence in close combat.
powers.vbn_notes: Useful when quiet manipulation fails and violence becomes necessary.

disciplines.name: Presence
disciplines.notes: The Discipline of supernatural allure, fear, and magnetism; Setites use it to become irresistible spiritual authorities or beloved corrupters.

disciplines.name: Obfuscate
disciplines.notes: The Discipline of concealment and unnoticed movement; many Setites use it to move through domains and temples without drawing attention.

rituals.name: Typhonic Rite of Revelation
rituals.system_text: A lengthy ceremony designed to break down an initiate's psychological defenses and bind them more tightly to the cult through carefully staged visions and ordeals.
rituals.vbn_notes: Useful as a story device for indoctrination scenes or to justify major shifts in NPC loyalties.

backgrounds.name: Cult Herd
backgrounds.system_text: Represents a group of mortals who not only provide blood but also worship the Setite as a spiritual authority.
backgrounds.vbn_notes: Can be translated into VbN as a combination of Herd, Retainers, and Influence in religious or subculture communities.

backgrounds.name: Temple Resources
backgrounds.system_text: A mix of wealth, real estate, and hidden infrastructure dedicated to Setite worship and operations.
backgrounds.vbn_notes: Maps naturally to Haven merits, Resources, and influence in city-level logistics.

merits_flaws.name: Devoted Flock
merits_flaws.system_text: The character enjoys unusually loyal mortal worshippers who resist outside manipulation and cling to the cult even under pressure.
merits_flaws.vbn_notes: In VbN this can grant narrative protection to Setite mortal assets and provide resilient rumor/information networks.

merits_flaws.name: Haunted by Doubt
merits_flaws.system_text: The Setite struggles with dissonance between doctrine and their own lingering conscience, creating exploitable hesitation.
merits_flaws.vbn_notes: An excellent flaw for PCs or important NPCs who might betray the clan or become secret allies of the coterie.

other_systems.name: Path of Typhon (Theophidian Path)
other_systems.system_text: A Path of Enlightenment focused on liberation from false morality through revelation, transgression, and devotion to Set as principle of necessary destruction and rebirth.
other_systems.vbn_notes: Key philosophical backbone for many serious Setites; VbN can use it primarily as a roleplay and story flag rather than a strict mechanical track.
